details.IncidentDetail: "[9] SEMI DID NOT INITIALLY STOP, RP FOLLOWED AND IS NOW STOPPED WITH THE SMEI DVR ON SR166 AT HUBBAR IN NEW CUYAMA IFO RICHARDSON PARK//RP ATTEMPTING TO EXCH INFO BUT DVR IS NOW UNCOOPERATIVE"
